common.title: Next Starter Kit
common.description: A Next.js starter template demonstrating Domains + Features + Core architecture

home.title: Welcome to the Next Starter Kit
home.subtitle: A production-ready template built with Next.js 16, React 19, and shadcn/ui. Demonstrates the Domains + Features + Core layered architecture pattern.

steps.explore: Browse the Products page to see the shopping cart demo.
steps.features: Check out the Contact page for a form example with validation.
steps.build: Create new features under src/features/ and add routes under src/app/.

form.subscribe: Subscribe to our newsletter for updates
